title: Real Algebra RCF Shadow

solver_reuse.target: real algebra negative-discriminant QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact polynomial replay computes discriminant(x^2 + 1) = -4, while the malformed real-root row requires the discriminant to be nonnegative.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional RCF-shadow rows only when exact replay reduces them to a source-linked linear, SOS, or RCF certificate; keep full CAD, SOS, real completeness, and epsilon-delta analysis in the Lean/RCF-horizon lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the linear ordered-field row as QF_LRA and replay the model through Axeyum.
Encode the nonlinear rows as deterministic NRA polynomial constraints.
Keep fixed discriminant obstructions tied to source-linked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the discriminant.
Emit and check SOS/RCF-style evidence for broader nonlinear UNSAT rows.
Keep completeness, least-upper-bound, and epsilon-delta theorem claims under Lean horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
